sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array_union (id UInt32, numbers Array(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_array_union VALUES (1, arrayUnion([1, 2], [2, 3, 4])), (2, arrayUnion([], [5, 6]));
SELECT id, arrayUnion(numbers) as unique_numbers FROM test_array_union GROUP BY id;
UPDATE test_array_union SET numbers = arrayUnion(numbers, [7, 8]) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT arrayUnion(numbers) as combined_values FROM test_array_union WHERE id IN (1, 2);
